

/****** Object:  Table [dbo].[__File]    Script Date: 4/15/2020 12:15:56 PM ******/
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO

SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [dbo].[__File](
	[Id] [int] IDENTITY(1,1) NOT NULL,
	[Name] [nvarchar](250) NOT NULL,
	[Extension] [nvarchar](20) NOT NULL,
	[Title] [nvarchar](250) NOT NULL,
	[Path] [nvarchar](250) NOT NULL,
	[CreationTime] [datetime] NOT NULL,
	[CreationUserId] [int] NOT NULL,
	[ArchiveTime] [datetime] NULL,
	[ArchiveUserId] [int] NULL,
 CONSTRAINT [PK___File] PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
(
	[Id] ASC
)WITH (PAD_INDEX = OFF, STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
) ON [PRIMARY]

GO





/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport
	(
	Id int PRIMARY KEY IDENTITY (1,1),
	LanguageId int NOT NULL,
	OrderTypeId int NOT NULL,
	CompanyLogoImageId int NOT NULL,
	ImportLogoImageId int NOT NULL,
	Header nvarchar(500) NULL,
	ItemsHeader nvarchar(500) NULL,
	ItemsFooter1 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	ItemsFooter2 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer11 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer12 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer13 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer14 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer15 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer16 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer21 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer22 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer23 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer24 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer25 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer26 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer31 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer32 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer33 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer34 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer35 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Footer36 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	LastUpdateTime datetime NULL,
	LastUpdateUserId int NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per

BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.__STG_OrderTypes
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Type nvarchar(100) NOT NULL,
	Description nvarchar(500) NULL,
	LastUpdateTime datetime NULL,
	LastUpdateUserId int NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__STG_OrderTypes ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK___STG_OrderTypes PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__STG_OrderTypes SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__STG_OrderTypes', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__STG_OrderTypes', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__STG_OrderTypes', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 


/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport ADD
	Address1 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Address2 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Address3 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	Address4 nvarchar(500) NULL,
	OrderNumberPO nvarchar(500) NULL,
	DocumentType nvarchar(500) NULL,
	OrderNumber nvarchar(50) NULL,
	OrderDate nvarchar(50) NULL,
	ClientNumber nvarchar(50) NULL,
	InternalNumber nvarchar(50) NULL,
	ShippingMethod nvarchar(50) NULL,
	PaymentMethod nvarchar(50) NULL,
	PaymentTarget nvarchar(500) NULL,
	UST_ID nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Position nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Article nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Description nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Amount nvarchar(50) NULL,
	PE nvarchar(50) NULL,
	BasisPrice150 nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Cu_G nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Cu_Surcharge nvarchar(50) NULL,
	UnitPrice nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Designation nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Unit nvarchar(50) NULL,
	TotalPrice150 nvarchar(50) NULL,
	DEL nvarchar(50) NULL,
	Cu_Total nvarchar(50) NULL,
	UnitTotal nvarchar(50) NULL
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.__PRS_OrderReport SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.__PRS_OrderReport', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
